command: fastp --in1 HomerSimpson_R1.fastq.gz --in2 HomerSimpson_R2.fastq.gz --out1 Trimmed/HomerSimpson_R1_filtered.fastp.gz --out2 Trimmed/HomerSimpson_R2_filtered.fastp.gz --detect_adapter_for_pe --cut_front --cut_tail --cut_window_size 12 --cut_mean_quality 20 --length_required 35 --json Trimmed/HomerSimpson.json --html Trimmed/HomerSimpson.html -t 32
